case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. MARITZA RUIZ MENDOZA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-27-2016 - PROGRESS REPORT CONTINUED TO AUG-26-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BY REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF.
